description: §14.8.7/§44.2 — the same `<db>` block WITH `src=` present resolves its schema source (shadow DB from the `?{}` CREATE TABLE) and fires no E-PA-006. The clean control for the missing-src reject.
source-test: compiler/src/protect-analyzer.ts (E-PA-006 fire site, step 1: src= presence)
rationale: protect-analyzer §step1: with `src=` present the analyzer resolves the path and (file absent + CREATE TABLE present) builds the shadow DB from the `?{}` block, so E-PA-006 never fires.
